title: geranium eriostemum
intro: Geranium eriostemum, also known as the wild geranium, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Geranium eriostemum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
